title: Legendary Enchantments[1.21-1.21.1]
description: Have fun with the new enchantments and the new boss!
body:
# The Legendary Enchantments Datapack
Adds 8 new enchantments.
Some can be obtained by trading with villagers, others by killing mobs, through enchantment tables, or from bosses.

Summon an Ice Illusioner by throwing a book, a lapis lazuli, and an ice block onto the same spot.
### The enchantments are:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Blast:** Launches the opponent high into the air.
 
- **Extendium:** Increases the mining range of pickaxes and axes.
 
- **Freeze:** Freezes the opponent for a short time, making them immobile. Costs 5 levels.
 
- **Lava Walker:** Gives you the ability to walk on lava.
  
- **Lightning:** Strikes lightning on your enemies.
  
- **Range:** Increases attack range.
  
- **Shrink:** Makes you smaller.
  
- **Velocity:** Reduces the attack cooldown.
  
</details>
